nodes.summary: Added an admin-only account filter to the routes table so admins can filter routes by owner name, while keeping the existing Latest/A-Z sort. The selected owner filter persists in localStorage per signed-in admin and resets safely when invalid or cleared. Route workspace now passes current user identity into the table, and the filter logic was isolated into a small preferences helper.

affectedFiles.reason: Added admin-only owner filtering, persisted selection wiring, and empty-state clearing behavior in the routes table UI.
affectedFiles.notes: Also now accepts current user identity props from the workspace.

affectedFiles.reason: Passed current user identity to the route table so filter persistence can be scoped per signed-in user and account labels can be rendered.
affectedFiles.notes: No backend changes were required.

affectedFiles.reason: Centralized localStorage keying and read/write helpers for the persisted account filter preference.
affectedFiles.notes: Keeps storage access out of the main table component.

nodes.summary: Converted the admin users timestamp from last-login to last-active semantics. The backend now stores and refreshes lastActiveAt whenever an authenticated request resolves a user session, while preserving lastLoginAt as a compatibility fallback for older records. The frontend admin users table and mobile user cards now show Last active instead of Last login.

affectedFiles.reason: Added lastActiveAt persistence, compatibility fallback serialization, and the TouchLastActive storage method used by authenticated access.
affectedFiles.notes: Also kept lastLoginAt as a deprecated alias in the public JSON contract.

affectedFiles.reason: Refreshed the active timestamp on successful login, password-based session renewal, and every authenticated request that passes requireUser.
affectedFiles.notes: The handler now writes back the current active time into the in-memory user before returning auth responses.

affectedFiles.reason: Renamed the managed user timestamp contract to lastActiveAt so the admin UI matches the new backend field.
affectedFiles.notes: The frontend type no longer depends on lastLoginAt.

affectedFiles.reason: Updated the admin users table and mobile cards to label and render Last active using the new timestamp field.
affectedFiles.notes: Kept the existing visual layout and added a neutral empty-state message for users with no activity yet.

nodes.summary: Restructured the router maintenance page centering after repeated right-alignment complaints. The template now uses a dedicated fixed .viewport wrapper with inset 0 and grid place-items center, while main is a bounded centered column and heading lines center independently. This keeps 'is temporarily unavailable.' on one line without letting it shift the whole screen right.

affectedFiles.reason: Restructured maintenance page HTML and CSS to fix persistent right-alignment/centering issues.
affectedFiles.notes: Added .viewport wrapper, changed body overflow/min-height behavior, bounded main, and centered heading lines independently.

nodes.summary: Investigated a Routes admin-page name mismatch where admin saw WAH4H/WAH4P drift. Root cause was a denormalized route.ownerName snapshot in MongoDB; the backend Routes list previously returned the stored snapshot directly. I changed the registry list path to re-resolve current owner names from the users collection on read, with stored ownerName as fallback. Added a unit test for owner-name fallback and documented the behavior in the backend README. Targeted backend tests for registry and api passed; full `go test ./...` still has a separate pre-existing registry test failure in destination tests.

affectedFiles.reason: Added user-based owner-name resolution in the route list path and preserved snapshot fallback logic.
affectedFiles.notes: Introduced a users collection reference, owner-name lookup helper, and display-name override conversion.

affectedFiles.reason: Added coverage for the owner-name override/fallback behavior used by route listing.
affectedFiles.notes: Pure unit test for the public conversion helper.

affectedFiles.reason: Documented that route list responses resolve current owner names from the users collection.
affectedFiles.notes: Clarifies denormalized snapshot behavior for future maintainers.

affectedFiles.notes: Made the sidebar/content relationship feel connected while preserving responsiveness.

nodes.summary: Implemented SSE-based realtime refresh for routes and admin users pages so open clients refetch when routes or users change on another device. Added a reusable frontend EventSource hook, a proxy route for the event stream, a backend realtime hub, and backend publish calls on route/user mutations. Verified backend api/realtime tests pass; frontend targeted lint still reports a formatting issue in the large RoutesWorkspace file, and the full frontend lint has unrelated pre-existing violations elsewhere in the repo.

affectedFiles.reason: Implements the backend in-memory publish/subscribe hub that stores and broadcasts route and user change events to connected clients.
affectedFiles.notes: New realtime transport primitive for SSE.

affectedFiles.reason: Covers the realtime hub broadcast and unsubscribe behavior so the push mechanism is safe to use in the backend.
affectedFiles.notes: Unit tests for publish/subscribe semantics.

affectedFiles.reason: Adds the /api/events SSE endpoint and publishes route/user change events after successful mutations.
affectedFiles.notes: Main API orchestration now emits realtime notifications.

affectedFiles.reason: Constructs and injects the realtime hub into the API handler at startup.
affectedFiles.notes: Wires the new transport into the backend entrypoint.

affectedFiles.reason: Preserves streaming response headers like x-accel-buffering for the EventSource proxy path.
affectedFiles.notes: Needed so the frontend proxy can relay SSE correctly.

affectedFiles.reason: Forwards the browser-facing /api/events endpoint to the backend SSE stream while keeping auth cookies on the same origin.
affectedFiles.notes: New proxy route for realtime subscriptions.

affectedFiles.reason: Provides a reusable client-side EventSource subscription hook that refetches on matching realtime events.
affectedFiles.notes: Shared hook used by routes and users workspaces.

affectedFiles.reason: Subscribes the routes workspace to route change events so the list silently refetches when another client creates or edits routes.
affectedFiles.notes: This file is still flagged by Biome formatting in targeted lint.

affectedFiles.reason: Subscribes the admin users workspace to user change events so the admin list silently refetches when another client creates or edits users.
affectedFiles.notes: Realtime refresh for admin account changes.

nodes.summary: Implemented SSE-based realtime refresh for routes and admin users pages so open clients refetch when routes or users change on another device. Added a reusable frontend EventSource hook, a proxy route for the event stream, a backend realtime hub, and backend publish calls on route/user mutations. Verified backend api/realtime tests pass; frontend targeted lint still reports a formatting issue in the large RoutesWorkspace file, and the full frontend lint has unrelated pre-existing violations elsewhere in the repo.

affectedFiles.reason: Implements the backend in-memory publish/subscribe hub that stores and broadcasts route and user change events to connected clients.
affectedFiles.notes: New realtime transport primitive for SSE.

nodes.summary: Fixed the frontend production build failure caused by the new /api/events route. The issue was an invalid relative import path to backendProxy; changing it from '../../../../server/backendProxy' to '../../../server/backendProxy' allowed Next.js production build to succeed. This was a narrow build-only correction after the earlier realtime refresh feature landed.

affectedFiles.reason: Corrected the relative import so Next.js can resolve backendProxy during production build of the app route.
affectedFiles.notes: Changed '../../../../server/backendProxy' to '../../../server/backendProxy'.

affectedFiles.reason: Confirmed the target module path and existing proxy helper used by the new events route.
affectedFiles.notes: No code changes were needed here.

nodes.summary: Fixed the routes page table border clipping issue and then restored dropdown overlay behavior by portaling the custom dropdown menu to document.body with viewport-based positioning. The table card keeps rounded borders clipped correctly while the 'All accounts' dropdown now renders above the card and surrounding content. Validation passed with targeted Biome lint on the touched files.

affectedFiles.reason: Changed the table card overflow behavior to preserve rounded border clipping on the routes page.
affectedFiles.notes: Set overflow to hidden on the card wrapper.

affectedFiles.reason: Moved the dropdown menu into a portal and added viewport-based positioning so the menu renders above clipped containers.
affectedFiles.notes: Also updated outside-click handling to include the portaled menu.

nodes.summary: Implemented terminal interaction UX improvements so right-click no longer opens the browser context menu, right-click now copies selected terminal text, and paste now uses a controlled plain-text path that clears selection to avoid lingering highlight artifacts.

affectedFiles.reason: Added right-click copy and controlled paste handlers, clipboard helper functions, and disabled xterm right-click word selection to fix terminal UX issues.
affectedFiles.notes: Context menu is suppressed in terminal; paste now clears selection and uses plain text clipboard data.

affectedFiles.reason: Reviewed existing terminal lifecycle and input wiring to ensure event-handler changes stayed scoped to presentation/input responsibility.
affectedFiles.notes: No runtime/session API changes required.
